title: Ace Joins the Road Briefly
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on ace joins the road briefly, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Ace Joins the Road Briefly. Ace steps between Luffy and the Marines, showing his strength while Vivi pushes the mission toward stopping Crocodile. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: VIVI?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: You mean Princess Nefertari Vivi...!? What would she be doing with the Straw Hat pirates!?

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: That's what I'm trying to figure out right now.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: There's also one other guy in this country... A man I have a very bad feeling about...

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: You know how much I hate the Shichibukai...

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: Are you referring to Crocodile, captain?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: But as a Shichibukai,

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta citizen
dialogue.text: He's technically on the same side of the World Government and us marines.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: He's always been a cunning one, since his pirate days...

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta citizen
dialogue.text: He's definitely not the type to quietly follow the Government's orders.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Tashigi... Remember this well...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: A pirate... Will always BE a pirate!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Here.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I wanted to give you this.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Hm?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hang on to that tight, y'hear?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: A scrap piece of paper?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Yes, and that piece of paper will bring us together in the future.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Uhh...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Don't want it?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: N-mo, I'll keep it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Having a naive and reckless little brother,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Is stressful to an older brother's heart.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm sure the rest of you have your hands full trying to take care of him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But I hope you'll continue to take care of him well...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You're leaving already!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yeah.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Why don't you stay with us a little longer!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I told you already. Meeting up with you was just an added bonus in coming here.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: C'mon, it's been so long!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I'm currently chasing after somebody...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: He's apparently been calling himself "Blackbeard" these days,

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: But he used to be a member of the Whitebeard Pirates' 2nd division.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: In short, he's my subordi- mate.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: He committed the worst crime you can commit on a ship... Killing a fellow crew member and then running away.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: As the division commander, it's my responsibility to see that he meets his end.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: If it weren't for something as serious as that, I'd never sail all the way back the other way on the Grand Line.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: The next time we'll meet,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Is when you're at the pirates' "top."

summary: This part highlights ace joins the road briefly and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
